programme.title: Bodyguard Seduction
programme.desc: A wealthy businesswoman must decide whom to trust when she falls for a sexy bodyguard who may be involved in a plot to assassinate her. When her life is threatened more than once by a mysterious killer, she relies on seduction to find out the truth.

programme.title: Tall, Dark and Dangerous
programme.desc: As Valentine's Day approaches, a successful real estate attorney finds her seemingly perfect match on a dating app. However, she soon realizes that the man is an impostor who stole the identity of his former roommate to insert himself into her life.

programme.title: A Widow Seduced
programme.desc: Longing for a companion, a widow discovers true happiness when she meets a wealthy businessman on an online dating website. However, she soon finds herself in grave danger when the man of her dreams turns out to have a mysterious past.

programme.title: Tall, Dark and Dangerous
programme.desc: As Valentine's Day approaches, a successful real estate attorney finds her seemingly perfect match on a dating app. However, she soon realizes that the man is an impostor who stole the identity of his former roommate to insert himself into her life.

programme.title: A Widow Seduced
programme.desc: Longing for a companion, a widow discovers true happiness when she meets a wealthy businessman on an online dating website. However, she soon finds herself in grave danger when the man of her dreams turns out to have a mysterious past.

programme.title: Have Thinning Hair? Keranique Can Help Regrow Beautiful, Thicker Hair!
programme.desc: If you have thinning hair or hair loss, Keranique can help regrow thicker, longer and fuller hair. Keranique is the number 1 hair regrowth system for women. Regain your confidence with beautiful, thicker and fuller hair in just 3 easy steps!

programme.title: Freedom to Leave the House! Inogen Portable Oxygen
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: Killer Single Dad
programme.desc: An expectant mother befriends a good Samaritan, unaware of his keen interest in her unborn baby.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Her Fatal Family Secret
programme.desc: An ambitious attorney must determine whether her estranged sister is responsible for their father's death - or if it's someone else close to home.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Stolen by Their Father
programme.desc: Fueled by her own childhood kidnapping, Lizbeth fights to get her daughters back from her ex.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My Father's Other Family
programme.desc: When a DNA test reveals her late father lived a double life, Shelby meets Rose, the half sister she never knew she had. However, when his inheritance comes into play, Shelby soon fears Rose will do whatever it takes to get what she wants.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Bad Guardian
programme.desc: When Leigh's father, Jason, suffers a fall, the courts assign him a guardian named Janet to help. But when Janet takes over every aspect of Jason's life, Leigh must find the strength to take down the guardian and the corrupt system that supports her.

programme.title: Who Killed Our Father?
programme.desc: After the death of her foster sister, Leila takes a DNA test and discovers the identity of her biological father and sister. However, when her father is tragically murdered, she soon finds herself in more danger than she ever could have imagined.

programme.title: Daddy's Perfect Little Girl
programme.desc: A 12-year-old girl becomes jealous when her adoptive father develops a budding relationship with a woman and her teenage son.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Before Your Father Finds Us
programme.desc: While living in witness protection, Sophia learns that her ex-husband, Mason, has escaped from a maximum security prison. Fleeing to a remote cabin in the woods, Sophia and her teenage daughter soon find themselves in a desperate fight for survival.

programme.title: The Good Father: The Martin MacNeill Story
programme.desc: Weeks after his wife's suspicious death, Dr. Martin MacNeill moves in his mistress under the guise of a live-in nanny. Shocked by her father's actions, his daughter begins to question everything she's known about him while uncovering a web of lies.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Before Your Father Finds Us
programme.desc: While living in witness protection, Sophia learns that her ex-husband, Mason, has escaped from a maximum security prison. Fleeing to a remote cabin in the woods, Sophia and her teenage daughter soon find themselves in a desperate fight for survival.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Grim Sleeper
programme.desc: Journalist Christine Pelisek (Dreama Walker) helps law enforcement investigate the alleged serial killer known as the Grim Sleeper.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: A View to Kill For
programme.desc: After inheriting her estranged father's mansion, photographer Molly and her family relocate to the exclusive neighborhood, but when a stranger breaks into their new home and leaves a warning message, Molly is run out of town by a mysterious threat.

programme.title: Danger Lurking Under My Roof
programme.desc: Suspicion falls on a woman's new neighbors when her teenage daughter goes missing.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: How I Met Your Murderer
programme.desc: The host of a true-crime podcast learns her husband was involved in the death of his high school sweetheart. After linking the crime to other murders in the area, she soon fears she may be living with a serial killer.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Sins in the Suburbs
programme.desc: Struggling artist Heather is intrigued by her charming, handsome, and seemingly quite successful next-door neighbor, Tyler. However, as news of a local serial killer begins to spread, Heather begins to question if Tyler may be involved.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Sins of My Husband
programme.desc: When police kill serial killer Tony Dandridge, his wife, Katherine, claims she knew nothing about her husband's crimes. When the mother of a surviving victim decides to support Katherine, it soon turns into a cat and mouse game of truth and lies.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Serial Killer Seduced Me
programme.desc: When aspiring artist Chloe accidentally takes credit for a painting of a murdered woman, she must discover its true origin before the killer sets their sights on her. She finds a history of murdered models, all leading back to the unknown painter.

programme.title: Murder at Highland Manor
programme.desc: Kate takes a job as a live-in tutor at a secluded Scottish estate for a mother and daughter who have survived domestic abuse. She soon becomes embroiled in the family's deadly secrets when she discovers the previous au pair mysteriously disappeared.

programme.title: Pushed Off a Plane and Survived
programme.desc: A skydiver miraculously cheats death after plummeting 4,000 feet from the sky. What appears to be a tragic accident soon unravels into a chilling web of lies and a quest for justice when she discovers her husband deliberately sabotaged her parachute.
